title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
